---
name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
---

## ⚠️ STOP — DO NOT USE THIS FOR PUBLIC DISCLOSURE

**GitHub Issues are public.** For security vulnerabilities, please email:

📧 **[Anfrage@Michael-Gahn.de](mailto:Anfrage@Michael-Gahn.de)**

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if applicable)

We will respond within 48 hours.

---

**Why email instead of GitHub?**
- Responsible disclosure allows time for a fix before public awareness
- Keeps sensitive vulnerability details private until patched
- Follows security best practices

Thank you for reporting responsibly! 🙏
